column2: Subject: a long wooden judging table on warm cream paper, three committee-member Rangers (different vests, name patches CHAIR, CLERK, MEMBER) seated behind it studying a giant clipboard labeled CONDUCT RUBRIC. A brass scale of justice sits on the table next to a magnifying glass, a fountain pen, and a steaming coffee mug. Above the table a hand-lettered banner reads 'CONDUCT COMMITTEE · SCORING RUBRIC'. To the left a smaller scroll labeled INCIDENT, to the right a manila folder labeled NOTES. A small carved wooden gavel rests on a sound block. Sweat droplets, motion lines, paper scraps drifting. NO photo-realism.

Subject: a Ranger in a brown vest with name-patch GUIDE holding open a giant pop-up storybook labeled HOW TO USE THIS RUBRIC. Three big pop-up pages spring out of the book labeled '1 · CHECK FLAGS', '2 · SCORE FACTORS', '3 · READ TIER'. Tiny diagrams pop off each page (a red flag, a 0-5 scoring grid, a tier ladder). The Ranger points at page 1 with a wooden pointer. Caption ribbon above: WORK TOP TO BOTTOM. Dust clouds, action lines, paper scraps flying.

Subject: a row of eight tall RED FLAGS planted in cream-colored ground, each flagpole topped with a different danger icon — a fist (violence), a broken heart (non-consent), a child silhouette (minor), a tipped wine glass (incapacitated), a creeping shadow (predatory), a knife (weapon), a megaphone with a finger pointing back (retaliation), a 'BANNED' rubber stamp (prior ban). A small frantic Ranger in a brown vest tries to take notes on a clipboard. A big banner above reads 'AUTOMATIC ESCALATORS · ANY ONE = ELEVATED'. Action lines, dust clouds, alarm-bell motion.

Subject: a Ranger in a brown vest with name-patch MEMBER carefully drawing a giant 0-to-5 number ladder on a chalkboard, with rungs labeled 0 NONE, 1 MINOR, 2, 3, 4 HIGH, 5 MAX. Ten manila folders fan out from the chalkboard each labeled with one factor — CONSENT, HARM, EMOTION, COMMUNITY, POWER, VULNERABILITY, ACCOUNTABILITY, INTENT, HISTORY, AFTER. A banner reads 'SCORED FACTORS · ONE PER ROW'. The Ranger holds a piece of chalk, chalk dust flying. Sweat droplets, motion lines.

Subject: a split-panel cartoon. Left panel: two Rangers facing each other, one with name-patch ALEX asking with raised eyebrows 'OK?', the other with name-patch JAMIE nodding with a big speech bubble 'YES!'. A green checkmark hovers above them. Right panel: ALEX leaning in while JAMIE shakes head with a big speech bubble 'NO — STOP' and a stop-sign hand. A red X hovers above. Caption ribbon across the top: CONSENT — ASKED AND HEARD. NO photo-realism.

Subject: a giant cartoon BODY-HARM METER drawn on cream paper, like a carnival 'TEST YOUR STRENGTH' tower. From bottom to top: a tiny bump labeled 'BUMP', a band-aid labeled 'SCRAPE', an ice pack labeled 'BRUISE', a roll of bandage labeled 'FIRST AID', an ambulance labeled 'MEDIC', a hospital cross labeled 'HOSPITAL'. A small Ranger swings a wooden mallet at the base. Caption banner: PHYSICAL HARM. Dust clouds, action lines, 'BING' bell at the top.

Subject: a row of five hand-drawn hearts on cream paper showing escalating cracks — first heart perfectly fine, second with a tiny chip, third with a small crack, fourth with several big cracks, fifth heart shattered into pieces with a tear falling. Above each heart a tiny thought-bubble: '...', 'oof', 'shaken', 'haunted', 'unwell'. Caption ribbon below: EMOTIONAL HARM · NOT ALWAYS VISIBLE. Action lines, small storm clouds gathering over the cracked hearts.

Subject: a stone dropped into a pond rendered as cartoon ripples spreading outward across a crowd of tiny Burning Man-style camp figures. Innermost ripple labeled '2 people', then '10', then '50', then 'EVENT', then 'ORG'. A small Ranger stands at the edge watching the ripples. Caption banner: COMMUNITY IMPACT — RIPPLES OUT. Dust clouds, sun rays, motion lines.

Subject: a stark cartoon. On the left a tiny figure labeled 'NEW' stares up at a towering figure on the right in a brown vest holding a giant clipboard labeled 'ORGANIZER · ROSTER · ACCESS'. The big figure casts a long shadow over the small one. Between them on the ground a thin scale tips wildly. A tiny banner reads 'STRUCTURAL POWER GAP'. Caption ribbon below: WHO HOLDS THE KEYS? Dust clouds, action lines.

Subject: a small cartoon figure looking dazed and unsteady at a wild night-time event, lit by chaotic sparks and dust. Around the figure swirl a half-empty plastic cup, motion smears, a missed-bus icon, an unfamiliar map, a tipped flashlight. A small Ranger to the side leans in with concerned face. Caption banner: SITUATIONAL VULNERABILITY · CONTEXT MATTERS. Dust clouds, action lines, swirling motion.

Subject: a six-panel strip of the same cartoon face going through escalating reactions to being told 'YOU HURT SOMEONE'. Panel 1: open hands, 'I'M SORRY. HOW DO I REPAIR?' Panel 2: half-smile, 'YEAH, OK, FAIR.' Panel 3: shrug, 'BUT IT WASN'T THAT BAD...' Panel 4: pointing away, 'WHY ARE WE TALKING ABOUT THIS?' Panel 5: arms crossed, 'WASN'T ME.' Panel 6: angry finger jab, 'YOU'RE THE PROBLEM'. Caption banner across the top: ACCOUNTABILITY SPECTRUM. Dust clouds, motion lines between panels.

Subject: a split cartoon. Left side: a small Ranger trips over a tent rope, 'OOPS!' speech bubble, a banana peel labeled 'ACCIDENT', sweat droplet of surprise. Right side: the same Ranger sneaks up holding a giant rubber stamp marked 'PREMEDITATED' in red ink ready to slam it onto an incident report, eyes narrowed, motion smear. Caption banner: INTENT — ACCIDENT VS DELIBERATE. Dust clouds, action lines.

Subject: a giant cartoon filing cabinet labeled 'PRIOR INCIDENTS' bursting open with manila folders flying out — each folder labeled with a date like '2023', '2024', '2024', '2025'. A small Ranger in a brown vest tries to catch them all with both arms while a clipboard labeled 'PATTERNS' sits open in front. Above floats a single small rubber stamp 'NO RECORD' (faded) and another big stamp 'DOCUMENTED PATTERN' in red ink. Caption banner: PRIOR HISTORY MATTERS. Dust clouds, paper scraps flying.

Subject: a split cartoon. Left side: a calm Ranger figure sitting in a folding chair, hands open, talking with the committee, name-patch shows 'COOPERATING'. A speech bubble: 'YES, HERE'S WHAT HAPPENED.' Right side: the same figure running away with motion smears, kicking up dust, looking back over shoulder with a finger pointed accusingly at the committee table. Speech bubble: 'NO COMMENT'. Caption banner: AFTER THE INCIDENT — HOW THEY ENGAGED. Action lines, dust clouds.

Subject: two Rangers sitting on a log with two coffee mugs steaming between them, one in a brown vest leaning in attentively (name-patch CHAIR), the other listening, a small bird perched on a branch above. A small banner reads 'CHECK-IN CONVERSATION'. On a tree to the side a note pinned with a thumbtack reads 'VERBAL WARNING · INFORMAL RECORD'. Soft sun rays, gentle motion lines. Caption ribbon: TIER 1-2 · LOW HEAT.

Subject: a small mediation circle of three folding chairs in a cream-walled tent, two Rangers seated facing each other and a third (name-patch MEDIATOR) at the head. A handwritten flipchart pad next to them reads 'AGREEMENTS · NEXT STEPS · DOCUMENTED'. A small ribbon banner above: FORMAL WARNING · MEDIATED · TRAINING. A clipboard rests on the mediator's lap with a stamp 'ON RECORD'. Sun rays, dust motes.

Subject: a cartoon rope barrier across the entrance to a fenced area labeled 'ROLES · SPACES'. A 'RESTRICTED ACCESS' rubber stamp in red ink stamped across a Ranger's photo ID pinned to the rope. A small Ranger in a brown vest stands on the inside checking a clipboard, while another figure stands outside hands in pockets. Banner across the top: ELEVATED — SUSPENSION & REVIEW. Dust clouds, action lines.

Subject: a dramatic two-panel cartoon. Left panel: a Ranger in a brown vest escorting a figure out of an event gate, a rubber stamp 'REMOVED' in red across the gate. Right panel: the same gate with a giant rotated rubber stamp 'BANNED · DOCUMENTED' across a manila folder, plus a smaller stamp 'AUTHORITIES NOTIFIED' beneath it. Caption banner: TIER 5-6 · HIGH & SEVERE. Action lines, motion smears, dust clouds.

Subject: a stocky Ranger with round glasses and a beard (CLERK in a brown vest, name-patch CLERK) hunched over a clipboard writing furiously with a fountain pen, ink splatters flying. Around the clerk float labeled scraps of paper — 'WHAT HAPPENED', 'WHO WAS THERE', 'TIME / PLACE', 'EVIDENCE', 'DECISION'. A small banner reads 'WRITE IT DOWN — DOCUMENTATION IS THE JOB'. Sweat droplets, dust clouds, paper scraps drifting.

Subject: two ranger figures facing each other on cream paper, name-patches ALEX and JAMIE. ALEX with raised eyebrows says 'OK?', JAMIE nods enthusiastically with a big speech bubble 'YES!'. A bold green checkmark glows above them. Sun rays, action lines. Caption banner: SOUGHT AND RESPECTED.

Subject: two ranger figures mid-dance step, name-patches ALEX and JAMIE. ALEX has paused with a confused face. JAMIE raises a finger and says 'WAIT — YES?'. ALEX nods, both smile again. A small banner reads QUICKLY CLARIFIED. Dust clouds, action lines.

Subject: two ranger figures standing close on cream paper, name-patches ALEX and JAMIE. Both have neutral expressions, body language is ambiguous, a small question mark hovers between them. A faded check is mostly there but unclear. Caption ribbon: NOT CLEAR · NO HARM. Action lines.

Subject: two ranger figures, name-patches ALEX and JAMIE. JAMIE holds up a stop-sign hand and says 'NO!'. ALEX still leans forward. A red exclamation mark hovers above. Caption banner: BOUNDARY IGNORED. Action lines, sweat droplets.

Subject: a ranger figure (ALEX) striding forward with arms wide, the other (JAMIE) startled, eyes wide. Above ALEX a small thought-bubble shows 'COULD HAVE ASKED' crossed out. A wagging finger off-stage. Caption banner: SHOULD HAVE ASKED. Action lines, dust clouds.

Subject: a dark heavy panel: one ranger figure (ALEX) looms over a smaller figure (JAMIE), shadow stretching. JAMIE's speech bubble 'STOP!' floats unread. A red SLASH mark across the scene. Caption banner in heavy black ink: COERCED. Action lines, motion smears, dust clouds.
Subject: two ranger figures shaking hands cleanly, big smiles, sparkle effects, no marks on either. A green checkmark hovers above. Caption banner: NO HARM. Action lines, dust clouds.
Subject: two ranger figures bumping shoulders accidentally, 'POOF' dust cloud, both shrug with a half-smile. Caption banner: TRIVIAL — BUMP. Action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure with a small band-aid stuck to their arm, scrape visible, a small wince but otherwise fine. Caption banner: MINOR — SCRAPE. Action lines, sweat droplet.

Subject: a ranger figure sits in a folding chair while another (red-cross armband, name-patch MEDIC) applies a bandage. An open first aid kit at their feet. Caption banner: FIRST AID NEEDED. Sweat droplets, action lines.

Subject: an ambulance with flashing lights, two paramedics carrying a stretcher with an injured ranger figure. A small clipboard labeled 'MEDICAL'. Caption banner: MEDIC CALLED. Dust clouds, action lines.

Subject: a hospital cross above a stretcher being wheeled into a doorway labeled ER. An injured ranger figure lies on it, monitors beeping. Other figures look on solemnly. Caption banner: HOSPITALIZED. Sweat droplets.
Subject: a single big cartoon HEART on cream paper, sitting upright with a smiling face, sparkles, a green checkmark above. Caption banner: NO EMOTIONAL HARM. Action lines.
Subject: a big cartoon HEART with a small frown, a tiny thought-bubble showing '...'. The heart is fine but pensive. Caption banner: MOMENTARY DISCOMFORT. Action lines.
Subject: a big cartoon HEART with a tiny chip out of its side, a single tear drop, a small thought-bubble 'oof'. Caption banner: BRIEF DISTRESS. Action lines.
Subject: a big cartoon HEART with several visible cracks, a dark storm-cloud hovering over it, raindrops falling on it. Thought-bubble: 'HAUNTED'. Caption banner: DISTRESS BEYOND EVENT. Action lines.

Subject: a cartoon HEART shattered in pieces, tears streaming, surrounded by tipped-over daily-life icons (an unanswered alarm clock, a half-eaten meal, a coffee cup spilled). Caption banner: DAILY LIFE AFFECTED. Action lines, sweat droplets.

Subject: a cartoon HEART in many shattered pieces, a hospital cross floating above, a small professional figure with a clipboard labeled THERAPIST standing nearby with concerned face. Caption banner: TRAUMA — NEEDS CARE. Dark storm clouds, action lines.
Subject: a single closed wooden door on cream paper, with the words 'CONTAINED' chalked on it. No ripples, no figures, just stillness. A small banner: NO DISRUPTION. Action lines minimal.

Subject: two small bystander figures peering through a window, eyebrows raised, whispering to each other. The rest of a quiet camp visible in the background. Caption banner: 1-2 BYSTANDERS AWARE. Action lines.

Subject: a small camp circle of five ranger figures around a campfire, looking unsettled, glancing sideways at each other. A thought-bubble above the group: 'DID YOU HEAR...?'. Caption banner: SMALL GROUP AFFECTED. Action lines, dust clouds.

Subject: a buzzing crowd of cartoon figures forming two clear factions, arms gesturing, mouths open, side-eyes flying. A small banner pole sticks up in the middle labeled DIVIDED. Caption banner: WIDER COMMUNITY DISRUPTED. Action lines.

Subject: a frantic figure with a megaphone shouting at a crowd, ranger leadership huddled to the side over a clipboard labeled 'CRISIS'. Caption banner: EVENT-LEVEL DISRUPTION. Sweat droplets, dust clouds, action lines.

Subject: a newspaper blowing through the air with a giant headline 'ORG IN CRISIS', figures on the street pointing at it with shocked expressions, a TV camera labeled NEWS. A small ORG logo crumbling. Caption banner: ORG REPUTATION THREATENED. Action lines.
Subject: two equal-sized ranger figures shaking hands as peers, both same height, both same vest, no name patches above each other. Caption banner: PEERS — NO GAP. Action lines, sparkle.
Subject: two ranger figures, one slightly taller wearing a tiny ribbon labeled 'EXPERIENCE', the other looking up admiringly. Caption banner: MINOR ADVANTAGE. Action lines.

Subject: a ranger figure with a popularity halo of small sparkles around their head, another figure looking up wide-eyed. The popular one carries a ribbon labeled 'TENURE'. Caption banner: SOCIAL LEVERAGE. Action lines.

Subject: a ranger figure with a clipboard labeled 'LEAD' standing slightly taller, name-patch ORGANIZER, with a smaller volunteer figure beside. The leader gestures at a wall map. Caption banner: ROLE AUTHORITY. Action lines.

Subject: a towering ranger figure with a 'BOSS' patch on their vest, a smaller employee figure looking up nervously, a clipboard in BOSS's hand labeled SCHEDULE. Caption banner: DIRECT SUPERVISION. Action lines.

Subject: a giant ranger figure on a wooden throne with an 'ORG' crown of laurel, a tiny figure standing far below at the foot of the throne. A scroll labeled 'ACCESS' hangs from the throne. Caption banner: INSTITUTIONAL AUTHORITY. Action lines, dust clouds.
Subject: two clear-eyed ranger figures, both standing tall, alert, looking around with confident expressions. Caption banner: BOTH CAPABLE & AWARE. Action lines, sparkle.
Subject: a ranger figure clutching a map labeled 'FIRST TIME', a small backpack on, looking around uncertainly. Caption banner: UNFAMILIAR WITH NORMS. Action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure with a half-empty plastic cup, wobbling slightly, eyes a little glassy. Standing alone with a sparse background. Caption banner: MILDLY IMPAIRED. Action lines.

Subject: a ranger figure stumbling in a dark area lit only by sparse stars, no one nearby, motion smears. A flashlight on the ground flickering. Caption banner: ISOLATED & IMPAIRED. Action lines, dust clouds.
Subject: a ranger figure cornered in a small tent, exits blocked by another larger figure looming, fences visible outside. Caption banner: CANNOT LEAVE. Sweat droplets, dust clouds.
Subject: a ranger figure slumped against a fence, eyes closed, a tipped drink at their feet, nobody around, a dim moon above. Caption banner: INCAPACITATED. Quiet, still, dust clouds in the distance.
Subject: a ranger figure with open hands extended, big speech bubble 'I'M SORRY. HOW DO I REPAIR?'. Soft halo of sincerity above. Caption banner: FULL OWNERSHIP. Action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure scratching the back of their head with a half-smile, speech bubble 'YEAH, OK, FAIR.' A tiny sweat droplet. Caption banner: QUICK ACK. Action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure shrugging both shoulders, speech bubble 'BUT IT WASN'T THAT BAD...'. Eyes glancing away. Caption banner: MINIMIZED. Action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure pointing emphatically away, speech bubble 'WHY ARE WE TALKING ABOUT THIS?'. Body turned half-away. Caption banner: DEFLECTION. Action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure with arms tightly crossed, scowling, speech bubble 'WASN'T ME.'. Caption banner: DENIED. Action lines, frustrated smoke puff.
Subject: a ranger figure pointing an angry finger directly at the viewer, mouth open mid-shout, speech bubble 'YOU'RE THE PROBLEM!'. Caption banner: REFUSED ENGAGEMENT. Action lines, dust clouds.
Subject: a ranger figure tripping on a banana peel with a surprised face, both feet up in the air, speech bubble 'OOPS!'. Caption banner: GENUINE ACCIDENT. Dust clouds, action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure smacking their own forehead with a comically big hand, speech bubble 'I SHOULD'VE THOUGHT'. Caption banner: THOUGHTLESS — NO MALICE. Action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure walking past a clearly marked DANGER sign while looking the other way, ignoring it. Caption banner: CARELESS DISREGARD. Action lines, dust clouds.
Subject: a ranger figure roller-skating through a CAUTION-tape barrier with a smirk, papers flying. Caption banner: RECKLESS — KNEW THE RISK. Motion smears, action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure with narrowed mean eyes, pointing a finger directly at a target figure across the scene. Speech bubble: 'YOU.'. Caption banner: DELIBERATE TARGETING. Action lines.

Subject: a ranger figure in a dark cloak, hunched over a calendar with one date circled in red marker labeled 'PLAN', evil grin, tiny props (notebook, map, watch). Caption banner: PREMEDITATED. Action lines, sinister motion lines.
Subject: an empty manila folder lying open on cream paper, a faded stamp 'NO RECORD' across it, a single quill resting on top. Caption banner: NO PRIOR INCIDENTS. Action lines minimal.
Subject: a manila folder containing a single faded handwritten note 'HEARD SOMETHING?'. Caption banner: VAGUE CONCERNS. Action lines, dust.
Subject: a manila folder with a yellow sticky note slapped on the cover 'TALKED TO THEM — 2024'. Caption banner: INFORMAL FEEDBACK. Action lines.
Subject: a manila folder with a bold red 'WARNING' stamp slammed across the cover. Caption banner: PRIOR FORMAL WARNING. Dust cloud from the stamp.
Subject: a manila folder bursting at the seams with papers, multiple papers labeled with different incident dates spilling out. Caption banner: MULTIPLE DOCUMENTED. Action lines, paper scraps flying.

Subject: a giant overflowing filing cabinet, drawers labeled with different event names (SOAK, BURN, REGIONAL), folders flying out in every direction. Caption banner: PATTERN ACROSS EVENTS. Dust clouds, paper scraps flying.
Subject: a ranger figure sitting calmly in a folding chair, hands open in lap, gentle smile, speech bubble 'HERE'S WHAT HAPPENED.'. Caption banner: FULLY COOPERATIVE. Action lines, sun rays.
Subject: a ranger figure sitting in a folding chair fidgeting nervously with hands, sweat droplets, anxious eyebrows, but still seated. Caption banner: COOPERATIVE BUT ANXIOUS. Action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure with arms crossed in a folding chair, looking sideways, speech bubble 'IF I HAVE TO.'. Caption banner: RELUCTANT. Action lines.
Subject: a ranger figure ignoring the committee table, fiddling with a phone, not making eye contact. Caption banner: OBSTRUCTIVE. Action lines, dust cloud.

Subject: a ranger figure looming over a smaller witness figure, raising a finger to lips in a hushing gesture, speech bubble 'DON'T TELL.'. Caption banner: INTIMIDATED WITNESSES. Sweat droplets, dust cloud, action lines.

Subject: a ranger figure sprinting away from the camp with motion smears, dust clouds kicked up, a 'GONE' sign falling behind them, a paper labeled SUMMONS fluttering uncollected. Caption banner: FLED ACCOUNTABILITY. Action lines.
